title: Document zephyr-clean-worktree.sh usage for native/64-bit MeshCore BLE validation
description: Provide exact command sequence from AGENTS.md and script help for creating, setting up, and verifying a clean worktree. Include EC2 mount steps.
close_reason: Documented clean worktree usage with full EC2+create+twister+verify sequence for native/64-bit MeshCore BLE validation; updated meshcore-smoke-test.md to use native_sim/native/64; verified script syntax; changes committed and pushed.
